theory.canonical_statement: The TZP emergence operator is defined as T\_TZP = Delta(omega\_L minus omega\_R) multiplied by Q\_ent multiplied by N\_ex multiplied by Pi\_TZP, where Delta enforces resonance between left (information) and right (energy) channel frequencies, Q\_ent measures entanglement, N\_ex governs exchange, and Pi\_TZP projects onto the TZP sector.
theory.technical_interpretation: The TZP emergence operator is defined as T\_TZP = Delta(omega\_L minus omega\_R) multiplied by Q\_ent multiplied by N\_ex multiplied by Pi\_TZP, where Delta enforces resonance between left (information) and right (energy) channel frequencies, Q\_ent measures entanglement, N\_ex governs exchange, and Pi\_TZP projects onto the TZP sector.

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This fixes the depleted vacuum sector that the entry treats as the source of local emergence.
This promotes the vacuum imbalance into an actual matter-generation flow.
This closes the progression by requiring a positive emergent matter sector.
